content_body: This mountain retreat was exactly what our family needed! The views, the adventure, and the beautiful cabin were all stunning! The architectural details in the home itself gave us so many ideas for our own lake house. We all loved the hot tub and fireplaces and relaxed watching the sunset with a glass of wine (we added to your cork collection)! We went ziplining, which we highly recommend, shopped, and (of course) visited some of the wineries. Fun was had by all! As I sit here writing on our last morning here, I am cherishing the memories we have made and want to thank you for sharing your beautiful home with us.
title: The Perfect Mountain Retreat in North Georgia
